scripts.build: rm -rf public && mkdir -p static/docs/api && (test -f ../server/openapi.json || (echo 'ERROR: ../server/openapi.json missing. Run "pnpm --filter @devicesdk/server build" first, or use "pnpm build" from the monorepo root.' >&2 && exit 1)) && cp ../server/openapi.json static/docs/api/openapi.json && pnpm run build-tailwind && node generate-og.js && node generate-agent-skills.js && hugo
